name: Chewy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the vegetable oil and brown sugar substitute until combined.
2. Add the vanilla extract, egg, and raisins to the mixture. Stir until well mixed.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the whole wheat flour, baking powder, baking soda, and wheat germ.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped raisins and wheat flake cereal.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks before serving.
